idea-plugin.name: AgentGuard
idea-plugin.description:
Governance observability for AI coding agents.

AgentGuard monitors AI agent tool calls, enforces policies and invariants, and surfaces governance events directly in your JetBrains IDE. See real-time run status, event history, and violation diagnostics without leaving your editor.

  • Run status panel — live governance metrics for the current session
  • Run history — browse past governance sessions with decision summaries
  • Recent events — stream of allowed, denied, and escalated actions
  • Violation notifications — instant alerts for policy denials and invariant breaches
  • Inline diagnostics — violation indicators in the editor gutter and Problems panel
